## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-07-15 — do not edit manually*

### Forge Harness Commands
*~18,401 tokens/session saved*
- In Forge SWE-Bench repos, avoid repeated `cd /home/floris/Documents/Repositories/Personal/AI/forge/.forge/swe-bench/... && ...` shell probes; set the shell `cwd` once or batch related probes into one command, then inspect the single captured output/log.
- If pytest output is abbreviated or redirected by RTK, open the generated `~/.local/share/rtk/tee/*_pytest.log` once with enough tail/context instead of rerunning pytest variants.

### RTK Read Guardrails
*~18,401 tokens/session saved*
- For `/home/floris/Documents/Repositories/Personal/AI/forge/.forge/swe-bench/sphinx-doc__sphinx-10325`, do not repeatedly `read_file` nearby slices; use `rg -n` to identify exact symbols, then read one wide range or the whole target file once with a raised output limit.
- `sphinx/ext/autodoc/__init__.py` is the main hotspot for inherited-members work; read the relevant spans around `inherited_members_option`, `filter_members`, and `Documenter.option_spec` once instead of refetching small overlapping chunks.

### Sphinx 10325 Environment
*~3,500 tokens/session saved*
- This SWE-Bench checkout runs old Sphinx under Python 3.14, where stdlib `imghdr` is missing; full Sphinx pytest can fail before the target logic runs.
- Do not spend cycles on system `pip install imghdr`; the environment is externally managed and the package probe did not fix imports. Prefer focused pure-function checks plus targeted pytest only after the missing-extension issue is understood.

### Forge Web Access
*~500 tokens/session saved*
- In Forge harness sessions, any web access must use `mcp__forge__web_search` and `mcp__forge__web_fetch`; do not use native/provider browsing tools.

### Task Tracking
*~221 tokens/session saved*
- Do not call `update_tasks` after every small read/edit in Forge SWE tasks; update once when investigation completes, once after edits, and once after verification.
- Avoid re-emitting the same inherited-members task list with only status churn; this caused multiple RTK refetch loops.

### Autodoc Search
*~93 tokens/session saved*
- For inherited-members investigations, use one combined search: `rg -n "inherited-members|inherited_members|inherited\.members" sphinx/ext/autodoc tests/test_ext_autodoc*.py tests/roots/test-ext-autodoc`.
- Avoid repeating `grep -n "inherited.members"` variants; the key hits are in `sphinx/ext/autodoc/__init__.py`, `sphinx/ext/autodoc/directive.py`, and `tests/test_ext_autodoc.py`.

<!-- headroom:learn:end -->
